value_effect: Can identify collector or high-value processor categories.
recommended_action: Use OCR result to cross-check processor reference data.

value_effect: Older sockets may increase board grading confidence.
recommended_action: Use socket text to improve motherboard grade.
Route to manual review if paired with dense IC layout.

meaning: RAM type and possible server memory identification
value_effect: Server/ECC RAM may receive higher confidence.
Useful for web matching and future Board Lens lookup.
recommended_action: Store OCR text for future matching.

meaning: Possible gold plating or finish clue
value_effect: Can support gold-contact confidence but should not override visual evidence alone.
recommended_action: Confirm with visual gold finger or connector detection.
Route to rare earth recovery review.

value_effect: May trigger specialty capacitor recovery signal.
recommended_action: Check board for tantalum capacitors and batch quantity.
